title: RevitIdentifiers
description: RevitIdentifiers: An entity containing identifiers of Revit element correspondent to the BHoM object that carries it.

ElementId.description: ElementId of the Revit element correspondent to the BHoM object that carries this fragment.

CategoryName.description: Category of the Revit element correspondent to the BHoM object that carries this fragment.

FamilyName.description: Family of the Revit element correspondent to the BHoM object that carries this fragment.

FamilyTypeName.description: Family type of the Revit element correspondent to the BHoM object that carries this fragment.

FamilyTypeId.description: ElementId of family type of the Revit element correspondent to the BHoM object that carries this fragment.

Workset.description: Name of the parent workset of the Revit element correspondent to the BHoM object that carries this fragment. Empty if the Revit model is not shared.

OwnerViewId.description: ElementId of view that owns the Revit element correspondent to the BHoM object that carries this fragment. -1 if the Revit element is not view-dependent.

ParentElementId.description: ElementId of the parent element of the Revit element correspondent to the BHoM object that carries this fragment. -1 if the Revit element is not a nested element.

LinkDocument.description: Name of the link document containing the Revit element correspondent to the BHoM object that carries this fragment. Empty if the Revit element is not a link element.

_t.description: Optional Type disciminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
